show_damage.config.title: Damage Number Configuration
show_damage.tooltip.enabled: Toggle the damage number display on or off.
show_damage.tooltip.smallThreshold:
Damage below this is considered 'Small'.
Affects color and scale.
show_damage.tooltip.mediumThreshold:
Damage between small and this is 'Medium'.
Affects color and scale.
show_damage.tooltip.gravity: How fast damage numbers fall. Higher = faster fall.
show_damage.tooltip.upwardVelocity: Initial upward speed when spawned. Higher = jumps higher.
show_damage.tooltip.spread: Random horizontal distribution range. Higher = wider spread.
show_damage.tooltip.enableMerge: Accumulate rapid hits into a single total number.
show_damage.tooltip.mergeTimeout:
Time without attacks before showing accumulated damage.
Recommended: 1000ms (1 second).
show_damage.tooltip.lifetime: How long numbers stay visible (20 ticks = 1 second).
show_damage.tooltip.fadeStart: When to start fading (80% = fade last 20% of life).
show_damage.tooltip.maxDistance:
Hide damage beyond this distance. Lower = better performance.
Default: 32 blocks.
show_damage.tooltip.shadowOffsetX: Horizontal shadow offset relative to text.
show_damage.tooltip.shadowOffsetY: Vertical shadow offset relative to text.
show_damage.tooltip.useCustomFont:
Allow resource packs to override the font.
resource packs Format: assets/show_damage/font/damage_number.json
show_damage.tooltip.forcedFont1: Forced font when custom font is disabled.
show_damage.tooltip.mergeModeHeight:
Relative height for merged damage numbers,
Percentage of entity height (110 = 1.1x height)
show_damage.tooltip.independentModeHeigh:
Relative height for independent damage numbers,
Percentage of entity height (80 = 0.8x height)
show_damage.tooltip.mergeStyle:
Visual style used in merge mode.
Affects animation and display.
show_damage.tooltip.independentStyle:
Visual style used in independent mode.
Affects animation and display.
show_damage.style.classic_merge.name: Classic Merge
show_damage.style.pulse_merge.name: Pulse Merge
show_damage.style.popup_merge.name: Popup Merge
show_damage.style.bounce_merge.name: Bounce Merge
show_damage.style.typewriter_merge.name: Typewriter Merge
show_damage.style.classic_pop.name: Classic Pop
show_damage.style.side_pop.name: Side Pop
show_damage.style.rainbow_pop.name: Rainbow Pop
show_damage.style.endfield_pop.name: Endfield Pop
show_damage.style.typewriter_pop.name: Typewriter Pop
show_damage.style.danmaku_pop.name: Danmaku Pop
show_damage.tooltip.showDecimal.1: Whether to show decimal part of damage.
show_damage.tooltip.decimalPlaces.1: Number of decimal places when showing decimal (0-2).
show_damage.tooltip.enableAbbreviation.1: Abbreviate large numbers using K/M/B suffixes.
show_damage.tooltip.abbreviationThreshol: Example: Set to 10000 to only abbreviate above 10K.
show_damage.tooltip.customPrefix: Fixed text added before damage number (e.g., 'DMG: ').
show_damage.tooltip.customSuffix: Fixed text added after damage number (e.g., ' HP').
show_damage.tooltip.maxSpeed.1: Max movement speed for damage numbers (50-200).
show_damage.tooltip.maxSpeed.2: Prevents numbers from moving too fast to read. Value/100 = blocks/tick.
